tool_args.label: Tolling Scenario G added to reduce truck diversions
tool_args.raw_text: Tolling Scenario G was added to the original 6 scenarios. By charging all vehicles the same toll rate as cars, instead of charging trucks more, diversions would be reduced

payload.claim_text: Tolling Scenario G was added to the original 6 scenarios. By charging all vehicles the same toll rate as cars, instead of charging trucks more, diversions would be reduced along with the relative incremental number of trucks.
